title: Ruby
description: Vanilla pack that has both nice look and QoL features!
body:
# Ruby by WerronPL

**Ruby is feature rich, QoL light modpack that does not add ANYTHING new. Upgrades look of minecraft while still preserving original feel.**

## But what does Ruby offer?
- good performance, even on low end computer / laptop
- shader support with modpack provided shaders
- ability to install resourcepacks, shaderpacks and datapacks from in-game
- nice looking menus
- dark and light gui modes (configurable)
- QoL mods like "Diggus Maximus", "Dynamic Lights", "EMI" and "Jade"
- optifine format textures support
- "apathy" mod if you do not like fighting mobs while still wanting them exist (Optional)

### Thanks for downloading my pack! make sure to check other stuff I make.

**notice:**
*every mod used in this modpack belongs to its rightful owner, make sure to check their work!*
